P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : Countable V
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ Measure.map (fun ω => G ω ⊔ H ω) P =
    @SimpleGraph.binomialRandom V (unitInterval.symm (unitInterval.symm p * unitInterval.symm q))
